case_title: TIZIANA COSTAMAGNA VS. ADOLPH GASSER, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COSTAMAGNA, TIZIANA AS TO DEFENDANT ADOLPH GASSER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ADOLPH GASSER, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTAMAGNA, TIZIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADOLPH GASSER, INC. $349.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $399.00, THE COURT AWARDS A TOTAL OF $1,000.00 PLUS COSTS TO THE PLAINTIFF. THE DEFENDANT IS GIVEN CREDIT FOR THE CHECK TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $651.00, WHICH THE PLAINTIFF MAY DEPOSIT OR CASH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ADOLPH GASSER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY COSTAMAGNA, TIZIANA ADOLPH GASSER, INC.
